question: Will the future job market see more new jobs created or more jobs replaced by technology?
response: The future job market is projected to see slightly more new jobs created than replaced by technology. Specifically, 85 million jobs are expected to be displaced, while around 90 million new jobs will be created in the next five years, according to the discussed trends. This suggests a net increase in jobs, though significant displacement and adaptation will occur.
